sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n114571" key="xreme/tisma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χρεμέτ-ισμα</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n114571.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">neighing, whinnying,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1441.tlg001:p.50H" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Iamb.Bab.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.50H.</biblScope> </bibl> (pl.): metaph., <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">χ. γάμου προκέλευθον ἱεῖσα</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.244</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Maced.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
